description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a rectangular L-shaped footprint, featuring a prominent double garage on one side and a covered entryway flanked by two tall, narrow evergreen trees. The exterior walls are clad in reddish-brown brick with white-framed windows distributed across both floors, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. The roof is flat, with no visible overhangs or decorative cornices, giving the structure a modern, utilitarian look. The front facade includes a recessed main entrance, sheltered by the upper story, and the garage doors are paneled and painted in a light gray color. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, and the house appears to have multiple interior rooms, as seen through the open floor plan. The landscaping is minimal, with the two trees serving as the primary decorative elements at the entry.
description: A modern, two-story L-shaped brick house with a flat roof, double garage, and symmetrical white-framed windows. The main entry is recessed and flanked by two tall evergreen trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway with two tall trees, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the L-shaped layout, brick exterior, and partial view of the entryway and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long, uninterrupted brick wall with evenly spaced windows and no visible entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick facade, window placement, and the depth of the L-shaped structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, flanked by two tall evergreen trees, and a double garage adjacent to the entrance.
